candidates.why: Exact total revenue line and equals Net sales in the preview; preferred top-line revenue label.
Not revenue; this is a cost line.
Revenue-related but non-GAAP, so less preferred than reported revenue.
Valid reported top-line sales line; appears equivalent to Total Revenue.

variables.notes: Use reported revenue lines as priority list; Total Revenue preferred, Net sales as fallback if label changes by year.

candidates.why: Direct COGS line and matches the top-line revenue presentation.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold
candidates.why: Also a valid direct cost line, but appears to be an alternate presentation and differs from primary COGS line.
Valid COGS synonym; values match Cost of goods sold.

variables.notes: Selected the direct reported COGS label.

candidates.why: Balance sheet accrual, not an income statement SG&A expense row.
Selling expense row exists, but this version appears to include depreciation because a separate 'Depreciation and amortisation' breakout sits beneath it.
Likely the selling expense excluding the separate depreciation breakout; preferred for SG&A components.
This version appears to include depreciation because a separate 'Depreciation and amortisation' breakout sits beneath it.
Valid overhead/other operating expense component.

variables.notes: Used component rows and excluded subtotal 'Operating Expense'. Chose 'Selling expenses.' because the row without period appears to include separate depreciation. For administrative expense, candidate list lacks the cleaner ex-D&A variant distinction; selected 'Administrative expenses' from candidates, but this may include depreciation in some years because a separate depreciation breakout is shown below. Manual review recommended to confirm whether the intended SG&A should instead use the lower administrative component row.
No R&D line appears in the provided statements.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line; usable only as fallback if no more specific interest expense is available.
Most specific and preferred interest expense label.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest expense component, but only lease-related and therefore incomplete as a standalone companywide interest expense.
Finance-related but not specifically interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure, not preferred over reported statement lines.

variables.notes: Priority list: use specific Interest Expense when reported; otherwise fall back to Financial expenses as closest net finance cost line.

candidates.why: Valid equity total, but includes non-controlling interests and would double count if MIB is also used.
Not equity; total balance sheet.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the better owner-only equity line present in the balance sheet. Selected 'Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders' to exclude non-controlling interests and avoid double counting with MIB. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

candidates.why: Exact balance sheet NCI line; preferred for MIB.
Also an exact balance sheet minority interest line; apparent duplicate of NCI.
Income statement attribution line, not the balance sheet stock measure preferred for MIB.
Income statement attribution line, not the balance sheet stock measure preferred for MIB.
